seeed_pca9685_init.message0: Initialize PCA9685 PWM controller %1 I2C address %2
seeed_pca9685_init.tooltip: Create and initialize Seeed PCA9685 PWM controller (16-channel PWM output), default I2C address 0x7f

seeed_pca9685_set_pwm.tooltip: Set PWM value, pin range 1-16, on/off value range 0-4095

seeed_pca9685_servo_init.message0: Initialize PCA9685 servo driver %1 I2C address %2
seeed_pca9685_servo_init.tooltip: Create and initialize Seeed PCA9685 servo driver (16-channel servo control), default I2C address 0x7f

seeed_pca9685_servo_set_pulse_range.message0: Set %1 servo pulse range min %2 max %3 max angle %4
seeed_pca9685_servo_set_pulse_range.tooltip: Set servo pulse width range (microseconds) and max angle, default 500-2500μs, 180°

seeed_pca9685_servo_set_angle.tooltip: Set servo angle for specified pin, pin range 1-16, angle range 0-180
